parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(
  jsonb_agg(row_to_json(turns) ORDER BY turns.created_at),
  '[]'::jsonb
) AS session_turns
FROM (
  SELECT role, message_text, project_slug, created_at, metadata_json
  FROM (
    SELECT role, message_text, project_slug, created_at, metadata_json
    FROM openbrain_chat_turns
    WHERE session_id = $1::text
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 6
  ) recent
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
) turns;

INSERT INTO openbrain_chat_turns (
  session_id,
  role,
  message_text,
  project_slug,
  metadata_json
)
VALUES (
  $1::text,
  'user',
  $2::text,
  NULLIF($3::text, ''),
  $4::jsonb
)
RETURNING
  id,
  $1::text AS session_id,
  NULLIF($3::text, '') AS project_slug,
  $5::text AS answer_text,
  ($6::jsonb)::text AS assistant_metadata_json_text,
  ($7::jsonb)::text AS response_json_text;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.session_id, $json.query, $json.project_slug || "", JSON.stringify({ top_k: $json.top_k, request_source: "crispybrain-assistant", trace: $json.trace || null }), $json.answer || $json.error?.message || "CrispyBrain assistant request failed.", JSON.stringify({ ok: $json.ok, query: $json.query, retrieval: $json.retrieval, source_count: Array.isArray($json.sources) ? $json.sources.length : 0, error: $json.error || null }), JSON.stringify($json)] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO openbrain_chat_turns (
  session_id,
  role,
  message_text,
  project_slug,
  metadata_json
)
VALUES (
  $1::text,
  'assistant',
  $2::text,
  NULLIF($3::text, ''),
  $4::jsonb
)
RETURNING id, ($5::jsonb)::text AS response_json_text;
